name: eventsolution
description: Event management platform — monorepo with Express API and React frontend

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.docker:up:ip: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.ip.yml up --build -d
scripts.docker:down:ip: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.ip.yml down
scripts.docker:logs:ip: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.ip.yml logs -f
scripts.docker:seed: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.ip.yml exec backend npm run seed
